title: scabiosa communis subsp. gramuntia
intro: Scabiosa communis subsp. gramuntia, commonly known as Scabiosa, is a flowering plant species in the honeysuckle family, known for its blue to purple flowers and edible parts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Scabiosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Scabiosa can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
